text.title: Design Doc Structure Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Design Doc Structure.

example.scenario: Engineer drafts design doc for a new payments callback handler: context cites spec.md FR-3, design cites AD-12 (Postgres), AD-15 (idempotency), alternatives list a queue-only approach with rejection, risks include retry storms with mitigation, rollout has feature flag + 30-min rollback.
example.trace: r1-five-sections → r3-adr-citations → r4-risks-have-mitigations → r5-rollout-has-rollback → artefact green
